options.description: An array of possible options for the custom field.

id.description: The unique identifier for the custom field, which defaults to the name property if the ID is not accessible.

name.description: The name of the custom field.

description.description: The description of the custom field.
description.example: The completion status of the employee's training.

type.description: The type of the custom field.

value.description: The value associated with the custom field.

value_id.description: The unique identifier for the value of the custom field.
